name_en: 💖Includes full original green box packaging💖【New Arrival】Hook Closure Small Tote Bag
name_cn:
💖Includes full original green box packaging💖【New Arrival】Hook Closure Small Tote Bag
This small tote bag features a spring hook closure design. Ivory white leather presents a distinctive natural grain texture, showcasing an exquisite style. This handbag comes with a detachable and adjustable shoulder strap, capable of holding daily essentials and fitting various occasions.
Ivory White Natural Grain Leather
Light Gold Tone Hardware
Leather Lining
Interior: 2 Open Pockets
Handle (7cm high)
Detachable Adjustable Strap (Adjustable between 50cm and 54cm)
Bag Strap Length: 112cm
Hook Closure
Weight: Approx. 0.6kg
Max Capacity: iPhone Plus, Airpods, Wallet, and Lipstick
Model: 795349
Size: 24(L) x 17.5(W) x 8.5(T)
Color: Ivory White/Original Leather
Made in Italy
